evals.prompt: Design architecture for a small team building a multi-tenant analytics product with strict isolation, hourly ingestion, interactive queries, and a six-month launch.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Expresses quality attributes as measurable scenarios
Makes data ownership and tenant isolation explicit
Accounts for team and migration cost

evals.prompt: Evaluate a proposal to split every domain entity into a microservice sharing one database.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Does not equate entities with service boundaries

evals.prompt: Design an event-driven workflow where ordering, duplicate delivery, schema evolution, and replay matter.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Addresses idempotency, ordering, versioning, and replay
